person.wealth_source: Bernard Marcus co-founded The Home Depot in 1978 with Arthur Blank; his net worth is primarily concentrated in Home Depot stock and real estate holdings.

hidden_upper_usd.trust_outcome_method: Giving Pledge signed 2010; $9B net worth suggests potential 10-year charitable disbursement envelope of ~$1B as uncertainty bound on pledged charitable portion.

rollup.tier_reasoning: Marcus signed the Giving Pledge in 2010 and maintains an active foundation, but observable charitable giving figures are not yet available in the pipeline—making a tier judgment premature. With ~$4 billion in estimated liquid wealth and three decades as a billionaire, the 5%-of-liquid-by-tenure benchmark would suggest cumulative giving in the $200 million range; the Marcus Foundation's grant history will determine whether he has met, exceeded, or fallen short of that norm. Until those figures surface, his tier remains pending.
